mapper.select: SELECT * FROM COMMENTS WHERE POST_ID = #{postId} ORDER BY CREATED_AT ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMMENTS (COMMENT_ID, POST_ID, USER_ID, C_CONTENT, CREATED_AT) VALUES (COMMENTS_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{postId}, #{userId}, #{cContent}, SYSDATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE COMMENTS SET C_CONTENT = #{cContent} WHERE COMMENT_ID = #{commentId}
